en: He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.
zh: 住在至高者的隱密處的， 必在全能者的蔭庇下安居。

en: I will say to the LORD, "My refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust."
zh: 我要對耶和華說： “你是我的避難所，我的保障， 你是我的 神，我所倚靠的。”

en: For he will deliver you from the snare of the fowler and from the deadly pestilence.
zh: 他必救你脫離捕鳥的人的網羅， 脫離致命的瘟疫。

en: He will cover you with his pinions, and under his wings you will find refuge; his faithfulness is a shield and buckler.
zh: 他必用自己的羽毛遮蓋你， 你要投靠在他的翅膀底下； 他的信實像盾牌，像堅壘。

en: You will not fear the terror of the night, nor the arrow that flies by day,
zh: 你不必害怕黑夜的驚恐， 或是白日的飛箭；

en: nor the pestilence that stalks in darkness, nor the destruction that wastes at noonday.
zh: 也不必害怕黑暗中流行的瘟疫， 或是在正午把人毀滅的毒病。

en: A thousand may fall at your side, ten thousand at your right hand, but it will not come near you.
zh: 雖有千人仆倒在你的左邊， 萬人仆倒在你的右邊， 但災害必不臨近你。

en: You will only look with your eyes and see the recompense of the wicked.
zh: 不過你要親眼觀看， 看見惡人遭報。

en: Because you have made the LORD your dwelling place- the Most High, who is my refuge-
zh: 你既然把耶和華當作自己的避難所， 把至高者當作自己的居所，

en: no evil shall be allowed to befall you, no plague come near your tent.
zh: 禍患必不臨到你， 災害必不臨近你的帳棚。

en: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways.
zh: 因為他為了你，會吩咐自己的使者， 在你所行的一切路上保護你。

en: On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.
zh: 他們必用手托住你， 免得你的腳碰到石頭。

en: You will tread on the lion and the adder; the young lion and the serpent you will trample underfoot.
zh: 你必踐踏獅子和虺蛇。 你必踏碎少壯獅子和大蛇。

en: "Because he holds fast to me in love, I will deliver him; I will protect him, because he knows my name.
zh: 耶和華說：“因為他戀慕我，我必搭救他； 因為他認識我的名，我必保護他。

en: When he calls to me, I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him and honor him.
zh: 他求告我，我必應允他； 他在患難中，我必與他同在； 我必拯救他，使他得尊榮。

en: With long life I will satisfy him and show him my salvation."
zh: 我必使他得享長壽， 又向他顯明我的救恩。”
